ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player's team */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the organization */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., captain, support) */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Current rank of the player in the organization or league */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the player (e.g., ELO score) */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the player's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader/player */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Current rank of the team in the league */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the team (e.g., ELO score) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the match */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., regular, playoff, final) */,
  "map_name" TEXT /* Name of the map played */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "loser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the losing team */,
  "score_team1" INTEGER /* Score of the first team */,
  "score_team2" INTEGER /* Score of the second team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the statistics record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "rounds" INTEGER /* Number of rounds played by the player */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills made by the player */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths of the player */,
  "planted" INTEGER /* Number of bombs planted by the player */,
  "defused" INTEGER /* Number of bombs defused by the player */,
  "friendly_kills" INTEGER /* Number of friendly kills by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "headshots" INTEGER /* Number of headshots made by the player */,
  "mvps" INTEGER /* Number of MVPs (Most Valuable Player) awarded to the player */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Shooting accuracy of the player */,
  "damage_dealt" INTEGER /* Total damage dealt by the player */,
  "healing_done" INTEGER /* Total healing done by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "prize_pool" REAL /* Prize pool amount for the tournament */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the tournament */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the tournament organizer */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the tournament's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the performance metric */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "kdr" REAL /* Kill/Death Ratio */,
  "dr" REAL /* Death Ratio */,
  "kst_percentage" REAL /* Kill/Survival Time percentage */,
  "assists_ratio" REAL /* Assists to kill ratio */,
  "headshot_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of kills that were headshots */,
  "mvps_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of MVPs awarded */,
  "team_contribution" REAL /* Measure of the player's contribution to the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team coached */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the coach */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the coach's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game played */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., practice, match) */,
  "map_name" TEXT /* Name of the map played */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved in the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of release */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Name of the game developer */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the game's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, analysis) */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user accessing the data */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
